items.title: First Terminal Routine
items.body: Grade 11 & 12 first terminal exams begin 20 Shrawan. Full routine posted outside Room 4.

items.title: School closed — Naag Panchami
items.body: No classes on the public holiday. Regular routine resumes the following day.

items.title: Lab fee — second installment
items.body: Due at the accounts window by the 15th. Late payments carry a NPR 200 surcharge.

items.title: CEE mock test — registration open
items.body: Grade 12 students may register for the entrance mock test at the science office.

items.title: Grade 11 result publication
items.body: Annual results are up on the student portal. Marksheets available from the counter.

items.title: Parent-teacher meeting
items.body: Scheduled for the last Friday of the month, 10 AM onward in respective classrooms.
